title: Golden Robo Retriever
desc: A quadrupedal loco-manipulator powered by ACT (Action Chunking Transformer) with real-time voice interface, designed to retrieve anything human asks for.

title: ERC4907 Demo
desc: A project demonstrates a ERC4907 use case. It comes with a sample ERC4907-NFT, a rental place for the NFT, tests for both contracts, and a script that deploys both contracts.

title: Soulbound Token Demo
desc: This contract establishes a soulbound token system where an authoritative Creator manages the lifecycle of Souls, permitting transfers only upon the Soul's explicit request.

title: 0xEth Portal
desc: 0xEthPortal is a pre-configured Hardhat Console clone that simplifies Ethereum network interaction by providing a ready-to-use terminal environment supporting both ethers.js and web3.js through a streamlined setup process.

title: Taipei Ethereum CTF Problem X: The Archive Room Secret
desc: In this Ethereum CTF challenge, players must bypass an "under maintenance" restriction to trigger an alarm and set the confidentialFileLeakedAlarm state to 0xbad, signaling that the secrets hidden within the Agent Robot Vacuum have been compromised.

title: LetterYou: An Afterlife Time Capsule Service
desc: LetterYou is a blockchain-powered time-capsule platform that utilizes NFT storage and decentralized verification systems to securely preserve and deliver messages to designated recipients following a user's passing.
